name: connectworld
description: ConnectWorld - Enterprise Real-Time Video Conferencing & Collaboration Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:proxy"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.test: cd server && npm test && cd ../client && npm test
scripts.lint: cd server && npm run lint && cd ../client && npm run lint
scripts.typecheck: cd server && npm run typecheck && cd ../client && npm run typecheck
